title: Opening for Production Engineer at Himalaya Drug Company

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Himalaya Drug Company
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
